text:
Bind9 tools fail with,

dig
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libfstrm.so.0: version LIBFSTRM_0.2.0 required by /usr/local/lib/bind-tools/libdns-9.18.29.so not defined

nslookup
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libfstrm.so.0: version LIBFSTRM_0.2.0 required by /usr/local/lib/bind-tools/libdns-9.18.29.so not defined

Bind9 pkgs installed:

bind-tools-9.18.29
bind918-9.18.30
